name: Functional - Successful HR Policy Query via /api/ask
description: Validates that a user can successfully submit a well-formed HR policy question to the /api/ask endpoint and receive a relevant response.
input: POST /api/ask with valid JSON body: {"user_input": "What is the company's leave policy?", "user_context": {"token": "<valid_token>"}}
output: HTTP 200 response with AgentResponseModel: success=True, response contains relevant HR policy information.
